source: PPAC / Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas — approximate, dated reference (no clean free live feed exists)

crude.note: The Indian Basket is the crude mix India actually buys (sour Oman/Dubai + Brent). PPAC prices it daily; this is a recent reference level.

lpg.note: 14.2 kg domestic refill, metro reference price. PMUY (Ujjwala) beneficiaries get a per-cylinder subsidy.

priceMechanism: Since 2017 OMCs revise petrol/diesel daily in principle, but in practice pump prices move far less than crude — they tend to rise quickly when crude climbs and fall slowly when it drops, with tax absorbing much of the swing.
